title: Dez Multipurpose Project (Dez Dam) -- Estimated Costs of the Dam and Power Facilities, by component (World Bank Appraisal, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION with visual verification. Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_dez_multipurpose_project_appraisal.pdf (76 pages, already present in the archive from a prior round, not previously mined into tabular data). Table located via pdftotext -layout page scan for 'ANNEX 1' (pages 58-60 of the PDF = Annex 1 pages 1-3). Pages 58 and 60 rendered to PNG via `pdftoppm -png -r 200 -f <page> -l <page>` and read directly with the Read tool because the raw pdftotext layer garbled numeric columns on these pages (e.g. page 60's sub-totals were visibly scrambled in the text layer: '38  7' where the image clearly shows '385 / 57 / 442'). Page 59 (Annex 1 Page 2, Section B Powerhouse + Section C Transmission) was legible enough in the pdftotext -layout output to transcribe directly and was cross-checked against the page image pattern used for 58/60 (same table format, no anomalies noted). All figures transcribed exactly as printed; no interpolation or estimation performed.
time_coverage: 1960 (cost estimate as of appraisal date; Section D covers planned additions through 1984)
frequency: single cross-section (project cost estimate, not a time series)
units: million Rials (foreign currency / local currency / total columns) at report's stated rate of 75 Rials = US$1; USD equivalents given only where the source itself states them (section totals)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source: 'IRAN -- Appraisal of the Dez Multipurpose Project' (World Bank, 1960), Annex 1 'Estimated Costs of the Dam and Power Facilities', pages 1-3. Section A = dam and works common to all purposes (irrigation+power+flood control combined), allocated one-third each to Power/Irrigation/Flood Control (865 million rials each) per the report's stated cost-allocation convention. Section B = powerhouse + first two 65MW generating units. Section C = transmission plant (230kV Dez Dam-Ahwaz line) for the first two units. Section D = planned additions (3rd through 6th units) through 1984, given as sub-totals only (no grand total column captured in the source table on the pages extracted -- the table continues past page 60, not re-checked for a combined D grand total). Companion dataset: wb1960dez-project-key-parameters (dam height, reservoir capacity, irrigation area, schedule, consultants) drawn from the same document's Summary and Conclusions section. Part of this project's systematic Pahlavi-era World Bank PDF mining effort (Round 38, mining/dams/industrial hunt).
